reason: Factory App settings, wiki, download, and API URLs can require authentication or trigger downloads.
Factory API examples require bearer authentication.
IANA example domains are placeholders, not real targets to health-check.
Placeholder Jira ticket URLs in examples are not public pages.
Placeholder Notion spec URLs in examples are not public pages.
Placeholder GitHub repository URLs in examples are not public pages.
Embedded video endpoints can be bot-protected or disallow link-checker requests.
